summary: Sets strategic direction, allocates resources, and reinforces the cultural and operational foundations of continuous improvement.
responsibilities: Define the strategic priorities and long-term vision for the CI‑OS
Allocate resources, funding, and staffing for improvement initiatives
Remove systemic barriers that impede improvement or operational flow
Review and approve high-impact CQI projects and major process changes
Champion continuous improvement culture across the organization
Participate in gemba walks and improvement reviews to model leadership engagement
Ensure alignment between CI‑OS activities and organizational goals
Monitor enterprise-level performance metrics and risk indicators
Sponsor cross-functional collaboration and break down organizational silos
Support digital transformation and modernization of operational systems
authorities: Approve major improvement initiatives and capital investments
Set organizational performance targets and quality expectations
Mandate compliance with CI‑OS governance standards
kaizenCapabilities: Leadership participation in gemba and improvement reviews

constraints: Decisions must align with organizational mission and compliance standards
Resource allocation must support long-term sustainability
